text.title: Exception Driven Standup Protocol — Decision Tree

decision-tree.root-question: Is the team distributed (>=2 zones), tracker fresh (<3 day lag), and standup time >= 75 min/week?

branch.conclusion: Run the protocol: AI pre-brief 15 min before, humans speak only on exceptions.
Block. Fix tracker hygiene first; pre-brief on stale data produces wrong exceptions.
Skip. Direct standup is cheaper than the protocol.
